scripts.dev: concurrently -n "backend,frontend" -c "blue,green" "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w backend
scripts.kill-server: powershell -Command "$conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($conn) { Stop-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -Force }; exit 0"
